'''âb-y-d-r''' ('''kabayderoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:outambush|outambush]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-y-d-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:outambush|outambush]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âb-y-d-r
|-
! Lemma
| kabayderoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thibayderoko|thibayderoko]] || [[word:jibayderoko|jibayderoko]] || [[word:shibayderoko|shibayderoko]] || [[word:kibayderoko|kibayderoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thobayderoko|thobayderoko]] || [[word:jobayderoko|jobayderoko]] || [[word:shobayderoko|shobayderoko]] || [[word:kobayderoko|kobayderoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠbayderoko|thĂŠbayderoko]] || [[word:jĂŠbayderoko|jĂŠbayderoko]] || [[word:shĂŠbayderoko|shĂŠbayderoko]] || [[word:kĂŠbayderoko|kĂŠbayderoko]]
|-

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
